name: chronic-pain-program-microsite
description: MCWC Chronic Pain Program participant-facing microsite. Education modules, cohort logistics, and community-partner content. Static Astro + serverless functions.

name: htcc-study-notes
description: Study notes and case review templates for HTCC recertification. Tendon repair, nerve injuries, and splinting protocols.

name: ot-handout-generator
description: Markdown-to-PDF pipeline for generating clean, printable OT handouts (sleep hygiene, pacing, pain science). Used at Bitterroot Rehab and the MCWC chronic-pain program.

name: cook-night-recipes
description: Recipe notes and session planning for the Missoula cook night with Sasha. Japanese, Korean, and Thai dishes organized by complexity.

name: missoula-mt-resources
description: A curated list of OT, rehab, and outdoor resources in Missoula, MT. Trails, climbing areas, and community events, maintained for local OT colleagues.

name: sleep-hygiene-worksheets
description: OT-adapted sleep hygiene worksheets and CBT-I tracking templates. PDF exports and printable versions for participant use.

name: blue-mountain-trail-data
description: GPX files and elevation profiles for trails in the Blue Mountain Recreation Area near Missoula. Useful for hike planning.

name: ot-protocol-notes
description: Personal Obsidian-backed OT protocol notes vault. Upper-extremity rehab and work-related injury recovery references. Personal use only.

name: climbing-training-log
description: Personal climbing training log and V3 and V4 project tracker at the Missoula Climbing Gym.

name: cookbook-log
description: Personal cookbook trial log; McKinnon and Hetty Lui recipe iterations and tasting notes with Sasha.
